from pyspark.sql import functions as F

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# INPUT: folder containing the extracted docs CSVs
# ------------------------------------------------------------
DOCS_DIR = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/MPESC-DOCS"

print("Reading from:", DOCS_DIR)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Read ALL CSVs in folder (and subfolders) + keep source file path
# ------------------------------------------------------------
docs_raw = (
    spark.read
        .format("csv")
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("multiLine", "true")   # safe if some fields contain line breaks
        .option("escape", "\"")
        .option("quote", "\"")
        .option("recursiveFileLookup", "true")
        .load(DOCS_DIR)
        .withColumn("_source_file", F.input_file_name())
)

print("Columns:", docs_raw.columns)
print("Row count:", docs_raw.count())

display(docs_raw.orderBy(F.col("_source_file")).limit(50))

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

docs_clean = (
    docs_raw
    .withColumn(
        "dateCreated",
        F.when(
            F.col("dateCreated").isNull() |
            F.lower(F.trim(F.col("dateCreated"))).isin("undefined", "null", ""),
            F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")
        ).otherwise(
            F.to_timestamp(F.trim(F.col("dateCreated")), "dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm:ss")
        )
    )
    .withColumn(
        "lastModified",
        F.when(
            F.col("lastModified").isNull() |
            F.lower(F.trim(F.col("lastModified"))).isin("undefined", "null", ""),
            F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")
        ).otherwise(
            F.to_timestamp(F.trim(F.col("lastModified")), "dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm:ss")
        )
    )
    .withColumn("uploadedDate", F.col("dateCreated"))
)

docs_clean.printSchema()

display(
    docs_clean
    .select("documentId", "dateCreated", "lastModified", "uploadedDate")
    .limit(50)

# 1) Extract blob name from full documentURI
#    - remove querystring if present
#    - strip everything up to and including ".../peas-documents/"
docs_x = (
    docs_clean
    .withColumn(
        "blobName",
        F.when(
            F.col("documentURI").isNull(), None
        ).otherwise(
            # remove querystring (if any), then strip the container prefix
            F.regexp_replace(
                F.regexp_replace(F.col("documentURI"), r"\?.*$", ""),
                r"^https?://[^/]+/peas-documents/",
                ""
            )
        )
    )
)

# 2) Extract case reference like "ROW_3168622" from path
#    - grabs first occurrence of ROW_<digits> anywhere in the path
docs_x = docs_x.withColumn(
    "caseRefFromPath",
    F.regexp_extract(F.col("path"), r"(ROW_\d+)", 1)
)

# (Optional) If you want a clean null instead of empty string
docs_x = docs_x.withColumn(
    "caseRefFromPath",
    F.when(F.length(F.col("caseRefFromPath")) == 0, None).otherwise(F.col("caseRefFromPath"))
)

display(
    docs_x.select(
        "documentId", "documentURI", "blobName", "path", "caseRef", "caseRefFromPath", "_source_file"
    ).orderBy(F.col("_source_file")).limit(50)

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

docs_for_join = (
    docs_x
    .withColumn(
        "CaseReference_clean",
        F.when(F.col("caseRefFromPath").isNull(), None)
         .otherwise(F.regexp_replace(F.col("caseRefFromPath"), "_", "/"))
    )
)

display(docs_for_join.select("caseRefFromPath","CaseReference_clean").limit(20))

CASE_REF_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/Horizon_CaseReference.csv"

case_ref_raw = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
      .option("header","true")
      .option("sep","|")
      .option("quote","\"")
      .option("escape","\"")
      .load(CASE_REF_PATH)
)

case_ref = (
    case_ref_raw
    .withColumn("CaseNodeId_str", F.trim(F.col("CaseNodeId").cast("string")))
    .withColumn("CaseReference_clean", F.trim(F.regexp_replace(F.col("CaseReference"), r'^"|"$', "")))
    .select("CaseReference_clean", "CaseNodeId_str")
    .dropDuplicates(["CaseReference_clean"])
)

display(case_ref.filter(F.col("CaseReference_clean").like("ROW/%")).limit(20))

docs_with_node = (
    docs_for_join
    .join(case_ref, on="CaseReference_clean", how="left")
)

print("Docs rows:", docs_x.count())
print("Matched CaseNodeId:", docs_with_node.filter(F.col("CaseNodeId_str").isNotNull()).count())
print("Missing CaseNodeId:", docs_with_node.filter(F.col("CaseNodeId_str").isNull()).count())

display(
    docs_with_node.select("caseRefFromPath","CaseReference_clean","CaseNodeId_str","path","blobName")
      .orderBy(F.col("CaseNodeId_str").asc_nulls_first())
      .limit(50)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load Cases.csv (CaseNodeId -> GUID)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
CASES_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"
print("Reading Cases.csv from:", CASES_PATH)

cases_raw = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("multiLine", "true")
        .option("escape", "\"")
        .load(CASES_PATH)
)

print("Cases.csv columns:", cases_raw.columns)

# Most of your Cases.csv files are 2 columns: [Case ID, GUID]
cases_lookup = (
    cases_raw
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col(cases_raw.columns[0]).cast("string")).alias("CaseNodeId_str"),
        F.trim(F.col(cases_raw.columns[1]).cast("string")).alias("caseGuid")
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["CaseNodeId_str"])
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Join onto your docs rows using CaseNodeId_str
# ------------------------------------------------------------
docs_with_guid = (
    docs_with_node
    .join(cases_lookup, on="CaseNodeId_str", how="left")
)

print("Docs rows:", docs_with_guid.count())
print("Matched caseGuid:", docs_with_guid.filter(F.col("caseGuid").isNotNull()).count())
print("Missing caseGuid:", docs_with_guid.filter(F.col("caseGuid").isNull()).count())

display(
    docs_with_guid.select(
        "documentId",
        "CaseReference_clean",
        "CaseNodeId_str",
        "caseGuid",
        "blobName",
        "documentURI",
        "path",
        "_source_file"
    ).limit(100)

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

# 1) Extract the Horizon folder AFTER the case folder:
#    .../ROW_3167600 - blah blah/<HORIZON_FOLDER>/...
docs_mapped_folders = (
    docs_with_guid  # (or docs_with_node / docs_x - whichever df you're on)
    .withColumn(
        "horizonFolderRaw",
        F.regexp_extract(
            F.col("path"),
            r"/ROW_\d+[^/]*?/([^/]+)",   # capture the segment right after the ROW_ case folder
            1
        )
    )
    .withColumn("horizonFolder_lc", F.lower(F.col("horizonFolderRaw")))
    .withColumn(
        "mpescFolder",
        F.when(F.col("horizonFolder_lc").rlike(r"^1\s+letters\b"), "Letters")
         .when(F.col("horizonFolder_lc").rlike(r"^2\s+parties\b"), "Submissions")
         .when(F.col("horizonFolder_lc").rlike(r"^3\s+internal\s+correspondence\b"), "Internal correspondence")
         .when(F.col("horizonFolder_lc").rlike(r"^4\s+decision\b"), "Decision")
         .when(F.col("horizonFolder_lc").rlike(r"^5\s+start\s*&\s*site\s+notice\b"), "Notices and order documents")
         .when(F.col("horizonFolder_lc").rlike(r"^forms\s+for\s+inspector\b"), "Other")
         .when(F.col("horizonFolder_lc").rlike(r"^1\s+relevant\s+authority\b"), "Submissions")
         .when(F.col("horizonFolder_lc").rlike(r"^2\s+other\s+statutory\s+parties\b"), "Submissions")
         .when(F.col("horizonFolder_lc").rlike(r"^3\s+interested\s+party\b"), "Submissions")
         .when(F.col("horizonFolder_lc").rlike(r"^4\s+internal\s+correspondence\b"), "Internal correspondence")
         .when(F.col("horizonFolder_lc").rlike(r"^5\s+decision\b"), "Decision")
         .otherwise("Other")   # DEFAULT
    )
)

display(
    docs_mapped_folders.select(
        "path",
        "horizonFolderRaw",
        "mpescFolder",
        "caseGuid",
        "blobName"
    ).limit(50)
)

# Optional: quick counts to validate mapping coverage
display(
    docs_mapped_folders.groupBy("horizonFolderRaw", "mpescFolder").count().orderBy(F.col("count").desc())

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

# ============================================================
# CREATE FOLDER ROWS FOR EVERY CASE
# ============================================================

cases_for_folders = (
    cases_lookup
    .select(F.col("caseGuid").cast("string").alias("caseId"))
    .filter(F.col("caseId").isNotNull())
    .dropDuplicates(["caseId"])
)

top_folder_template = spark.createDataFrame(
    [
        ("Letters", 100),
        ("Internal correspondence", 200),
        ("Submissions", 300),
        ("Notices and order documents", 400),
        ("Decision", 500),
        ("Advertised modifications", 600),
        ("Other", 700),
    ],
    ["displayName", "displayOrder"]
)

top_level_folders = (
    cases_for_folders
    .crossJoin(top_folder_template)
    .withColumn("id", F.expr("uuid()"))
    .withColumn("parentFolderId", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    .withColumn("isCustom", F.lit(False))
    .withColumn("deletedAt", F.lit(None).cast("timestamp"))
    .select(
        "id",
        "displayName",
        "displayOrder",
        "parentFolderId",
        "caseId",
        "isCustom",
        "deletedAt"
    )
)

advertised_modifications_parents = (
    top_level_folders
    .filter(F.col("displayName") == "Advertised modifications")
    .select(
        F.col("caseId"),
        F.col("id").alias("parentFolderId")
    )
)

child_folder_template = spark.createDataFrame(
    [
        ("Communications", 100),
        ("Representations", 200),
        ("New decision", 300),
    ],
    ["displayName", "displayOrder"]
)

child_folders = (
    advertised_modifications_parents
    .crossJoin(child_folder_template)
    .withColumn("id", F.expr("uuid()"))
    .withColumn("isCustom", F.lit(False))
    .withColumn("deletedAt", F.lit(None).cast("timestamp"))
    .select(
        "id",
        "displayName",
        "displayOrder",
        "parentFolderId",
        "caseId",
        "isCustom",
        "deletedAt"
    )
)

folders_for_load = top_level_folders.unionByName(child_folders)

print("Folder rows to load:", folders_for_load.count())
display(folders_for_load.limit(50))

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

# ============================================================
# MAP DOCUMENTS TO CASE-SPECIFIC FOLDER IDS
# ============================================================

folder_lookup = (
    top_level_folders
    .withColumn("folderDisplayName_norm", F.lower(F.trim(F.col("displayName"))))
    .select(
        F.col("id").alias("folderId"),
        F.col("caseId").cast("string").alias("folderCaseId"),
        F.col("displayName").alias("folderDisplayName"),
        "folderDisplayName_norm"
    )
)

docs_norm = (
    docs_mapped_folders
    .withColumn("caseGuid", F.col("caseGuid").cast("string"))
    .withColumn("mpescFolder_norm", F.lower(F.trim(F.col("mpescFolder"))))
)

docs_joined = (
    docs_norm
    .join(
        folder_lookup,
        (
            (docs_norm["caseGuid"] == folder_lookup["folderCaseId"]) &
            (docs_norm["mpescFolder_norm"] == folder_lookup["folderDisplayName_norm"])
        ),
        "left"
    )
)

other_lookup = (
    folder_lookup
    .filter(F.col("folderDisplayName_norm") == "other")
    .select(
        F.col("folderCaseId").alias("otherCaseId"),
        F.col("folderId").alias("otherFolderId"),
        F.col("folderDisplayName").alias("otherFolderDisplayName")
    )
)

docs_with_folder_guid = (
    docs_joined
    .join(
        other_lookup,
        docs_joined["caseGuid"] == other_lookup["otherCaseId"],
        "left"
    )
    .withColumn("folderId", F.coalesce(F.col("folderId"), F.col("otherFolderId")))
    .withColumn("folderDisplayName", F.coalesce(F.col("folderDisplayName"), F.col("otherFolderDisplayName")))
    .drop(
        "folderCaseId",
        "folderDisplayName_norm",
        "mpescFolder_norm",
        "otherCaseId",
        "otherFolderId",
        "otherFolderDisplayName"
    )
)

display(
    docs_with_folder_guid.select(
        "path",
        "mpescFolder",
        "folderDisplayName",
        "folderId",
        "caseGuid",
        "blobName"
    ).limit(50)
)

cases_csv_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"

cases_df = (
    spark.read
        .format("csv")
        .option("header", "true")
        .load(cases_csv_path)
        .select(
            F.col("Case ID").cast("string").alias("caseNodeId_str")
        )
        .distinct()
)

docs_filtered = (
    docs_with_folder_guid
        .withColumn("CaseNodeId_str", F.col("CaseNodeId_str").cast("string"))
        .join(
            cases_df.withColumnRenamed("caseNodeId_str", "caseNodeId_str_filter"),
            F.col("CaseNodeId_str") == F.col("caseNodeId_str_filter"),
            "inner"
        )
        .drop("caseNodeId_str_filter")
)

print("Row count after Cases.csv filter:", docs_filtered.count())
display(docs_filtered.limit(10))

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

docs_with_mime = (
    docs_filtered
    .withColumn(
        "fileExtensionClean",
        F.lower(
            F.regexp_extract(F.col("filename").cast("string"), r"\.([A-Za-z0-9]+)$", 1)
        )
    )
    .withColumn(
        "mime",
        F.when(F.col("fileExtensionClean") == "pdf", "application/pdf")
        .when(F.col("fileExtensionClean") == "doc", "application/msword")
        .when(F.col("fileExtensionClean") == "docx", "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document")
        .when(F.col("fileExtensionClean") == "xls", "application/vnd.ms-excel")
        .when(F.col("fileExtensionClean") == "xlsx", "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet")
        .when(F.col("fileExtensionClean") == "csv", "text/csv")
        .when(F.col("fileExtensionClean") == "txt", "text/plain")
        .when(F.col("fileExtensionClean") == "msg", "application/vnd.ms-outlook")
        .otherwise(F.col("mime"))  # 👈 fallback to original
    )
)

display(
    docs_with_mime.select("filename", "fileExtensionClean", "mime").limit(20)

DOCUMENT_OUTPUT_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/Document"
FOLDER_OUTPUT_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/Folder"

(
    docs_with_mime
    .coalesce(1)
    .write
    .mode("overwrite")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\\")
    .csv(DOCUMENT_OUTPUT_PATH)
)

(
    folders_for_load
    .coalesce(1)
    .write
    .mode("overwrite")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\\")
    .csv(FOLDER_OUTPUT_PATH)
)

print("Wrote Document output to:", DOCUMENT_OUTPUT_PATH)
print("Wrote Folder output to:", FOLDER_OUTPUT_PATH)
